title: Elysium Vanguard Capsule
description: The typed manifest for a single distributable unit in the Elysium Vanguard Marketplace. The schema is append-only; a breaking change is a new $id + a migration tool.

apiVersion.description: The Capsule API version. A breaking change is a new version + a migration tool. Per .ai/AGENTS.md 24.1: append-only.

id.description: The typed capsule id. The id follows the Java package naming convention (e.g. com.elysium.blender.arm64) so a creator's namespace is respected.

version.description: SemVer 2.0 version. The patch is mandatory; the pre-release is optional.

description.description: One-paragraph description. Plain text, no markup.

executable.description: Absolute path inside the capsule's rootfs. Must start with /.

args.description: CLI args passed to the executable. Each arg is a literal token (no shell expansion).

workingDirectory.description: Absolute path inside the rootfs. Must start with /.

gpu.description: The GPU API + driver the capsule needs. The runtime checks the device's actual capabilities before launching.

permissions.description: The runtime access the capsule needs. Per Zero Trust (vision section 9), the platform assumes any executable can be hostile; declare the MINIMUM access needed.

network.description: True if the capsule can reach the network. The runtime's deny-by-default policy (Phase 105) starts at false; requires NetworkPolicySpec.ALLOW_LIST to enable.

storage.description: List of storage scopes the capsule can read. A pure-sandbox (no network AND empty storage) is rejected at parse time.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature of the canonical JSON (with signature set to empty string). Format: ed25519:<base64-bytes>.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical JSON (with signature + contentHash fields omitted). 64 hex chars.

gpuApi.description: The GPU API the capsule needs.

gpuDriver.description: The GPU driver the capsule needs.

storageScope.description: A storage scope the capsule can read.

allOf.description: A capsule with no network AND empty storage is a pure sandbox (the runtime would deny every I/O). Rejected at parse time.
The driver must support the requested GPU API. See the SCHEMA.md 'GPU API x driver matrix' for the supported combinations.
allOf.comments: Valid combinations: NONE+*, TURNIP+OPENGL_ES/VULKAN, FREEDRENO+OPENGL_ES, PANFROST+OPENGL_ES/VULKAN, LIMA+OPENGL_ES, SOFTPIPE+OPENGL_ES, DXVK+VULKAN, VKD3D_PROTON+VULKAN.
